title: An Act to Increase the Debt Limit of the Vinalhaven Water District
last_house_action: 3/30/2026 - This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/2/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED - Emergency - 2/3 Elected Required, in concurrence.

actions.description: Committee on Energy, Utilities and Technology suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY in concurrence

Report READ and ACCEPTED, in concurrence. READ ONCE Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED , in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
This being an emergency measure, a two-thirds vote of all the members elected to the House was necessary. PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
